chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-278 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of main case 20-03-2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. Learned AAG has drawn our attention to the comments filed by respondent No.3 / District Education Officer (Primary) Naushahro Feroze stating that appointment of the petitioner as Chowkidar is forged and bogus. Be that as it may, since no one is present on behalf of the petitioner, the petition is dismissed in non-prosecution JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
